description: Route-group inhibition policy. group_matrix[source_group][target_group] expands to all Unit pairs in those groups. The expanded coefficients preserve the frozen v1.0a behavior.

rationale.implementation->direct_response: An active implementation route mildly suppresses a plain response.
rationale.clarification->implementation: Missing information suppresses implementation across the whole implementation group.
rationale.clarification->direct_response: Clarification takes precedence over answering when the input is ambiguous.
rationale.compression->exploration: Compression is convergent and suppresses divergent exploration.
rationale.verification->exploration: Verification keeps the system focused on checking the current artifact.
